tagline: Upload a plant leaf image and get instant disease diagnosis with treatment advice — in seconds.
name: Full Name
drag_drop: Drag & drop or click to upload
hero_headline: Protect Your Crops with Intelligent AI
feature1_desc: TensorFlow-powered model trained on 50,000+ plant images for accurate diagnosis.
feature2_desc: Get detailed treatment protocols and prevention tips curated by agronomy experts.
feature3_desc: Real-time disease outbreak visualization across India's agricultural regions.
feature4_desc: Track your scan history, disease trends, and weekly activity at a glance.
feature5_desc: Available in English, Hindi, and Punjabi — speak the language of the farmer.
feature6_desc: Fully responsive design — use it right from your smartphone in the field.
step1_desc: Take a clear photo of the affected plant leaf
step2_desc: Our model analyzes the image in under 2 seconds
step3_desc: Disease name, confidence score & treatment plan
step4_desc: Follow expert-curated treatment and prevention tips
no_history: No scans yet. Upload your first leaf image!
